params_used.custom_text: // This module is designed to select one of four 4-bit input signals (d, c, b, or a) based on a 2-bit selection input (sel). Depending on the value of sel, the output (out) will reflect the selected input: when sel=0, output d; when sel=1, output c; when sel=2, output b; and when sel=3, output a. If sel has an invalid value, the output will be set to an undefined state.
